spec.name: A Narrow Trail Through The Deep, Dark Forest
spec.description: You are on a narrow trail winding its way between the enormous, grey trunks. The crowns of the trees must be very dense, as they leave the forest floor in utter darkness. The trail leads east and west.

north.description: A small shadowy path leads away to the north.

east.description: The narrow trail leads east to a somewhat lighter part of the forest.

west.description: The narrow, dusty trail leads west through the forest.

extra_descs.description: The dark and dusty trail seems fragile compared to the massive trunks, and in some places, giant grey roots have broken up through its surface.
These ancient trees must have been here for many, many years. It is impossible to catch even a glimpse of anything above the lowest branches.
